The relative efficiency of this detector - 34.7%

The experimental yields of the reactions were
normalized to one electron of the accelerated beam
incident on the bremsstrahlung target and calculated
using the formula (1) of the article.
To exclude the influence of the total photon
absorption cross section the calibration with
respect to the yield of the most probable reaction
was used. The 59Co(g,n)58m+gCo reaction was chosen
The relative yields presented in accordance with
equation (1) of article. This is mean that data
units are NO-DIM, not PER-CENT as is designated
No informayion on source of uncertainties.
